rationale: Clean task successfully completed. The agent read routes.tsx (the central route configuration file), main.tsx (entry point with BrowserRouter), all layout components (LogoOnlyLayout, DashboardLayout, AuthLayout), and Page404.tsx. The final answer accurately covers: (1) Dashboard route tree (/dashboard, /dashboard/app, /dashboard/user, /dashboard/products, /dashboard/blog), (2) Auth-related pages (/login, /register) and their layout, (3) Three redirects (/ → /dashboard, /dashboard → /dashboard/app, catch-all → /404), (4) 404 fallback behavior with Page404 component details. The agent also correctly identified that no auth guards exist and that AuthLayout is unused dead code. All requested aspects of routing organization are explained with accurate technical details drawn from the source files.
